title: PERSONNEL FILE: RYU HUNTER
subtitle: Site Director, APD-14
author: Human Resources, APD-14
summary: Current Site Director for APD-14. Oversees archival operations, containment logistics, and personnel welfare.
body:
**Designation:** Site Director

**Assignment:** APD-14

**Status:** Active

### Summary

Ryu Hunter has served as Site Director of APD-14 since its founding, overseeing archival operations, containment logistics, and day-to-day personnel welfare. Performance reviews consistently note a preference for measured protocol enforcement over reactionary discipline, and a hands-on approach to onboarding new researchers personally rather than delegating orientation to subordinates.

### Notes

Maintains parallel administrative ties to other archival projects outside the standard APD network. Cross-referenced but not duplicated in this record.
